name: @agenttool/browser
description: Local-first browser control shaped for agents
author: AgentTool contributors

scripts.smoke:runtimes: node --input-type=module --eval "const m = await import('./dist/src/index.js'); if (typeof m.AgentBrowser !== 'function' || typeof m.resolveBrowserCapabilities !== 'function' || typeof m.planBrowserAction !== 'function') process.exit(1)" && bun --eval "const m = await import('./dist/src/index.js'); if (typeof m.AgentBrowser !== 'function' || typeof m.resolveBrowserCapabilities !== 'function' || typeof m.planBrowserAction !== 'function') process.exit(1)"
scripts.ci: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun run smoke:runtimes && bun run check:package
scripts.prepack: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
